agents.name: ACR Calibration Agent
agents.summary: Adjust Asset Criticality Rating per tag (set / +N / −N) with a business justification; bulk via natural language.

agents.name: Certificate Agent
agents.summary: Tags certificates failing in the next 12 months, builds two heat maps, and caches IoT/app devices from certs.

agents.name: Custom App Name Agent
agents.summary: Finds software missing from inventory via routes/paths; tag custom apps in plain English ('Tag my custom app navi').

agents.name: IoT Discovery Squad
agents.summary: Four cooperating agents: discover IoT devices, expand plugins, cross-reference, and learn new detections (HITL).
